meta.illustrative_only: integrity.content_hash and integrity.signature.value are placeholders, not real cryptographic outputs. Validates BASIC + STRICT (which don't recompute or verify) but would FAIL HSI-VALIDATE-INTEGRITY (RFC-HSI-0009 §7).
